# Sales Strategy 2026 Q2

## Focus

Grow wholesale revenue to 30 percent of total by expanding the B2B discount tier program to office-fitout resellers in the Benelux region.

## Bets

Two bets this quarter: a self-serve wholesale portal that quotes tier pricing live, and a referral bonus for existing wholesale accounts that bring in a new reseller.

## Out of Scope

No new consumer product lines this quarter; the desk mat refresh moves to Q3.
